questions.question: Explain the primary difference between S/MIME and PGP (Pretty Good Privacy) in terms of key management.
questions.hint: Key management is a critical aspect of both technologies.

questions.question: A user receives an email with an untrusted digital certificate. What is the recommended course of action to verify the sender's identity?
questions.hint: Review the sender's certificate and check for any security warnings.

questions.question: Describe the process of installing a S/MIME certificate on an email client. What are the key steps involved?
questions.hint: This question assesses the student's understanding of the installation process as well as their ability to describe it in detail.
